text:
There was a small, white cat with glasses who lived in a quaint little town on the edge of the English countryside. This cat’s name was Whiskers because he often swiped the nose marking from his human caregiver, Iris. Iris, despite her name, did not wear glasses; it was just an inside joke between her and Whiskers.

One peculiar day, Iris read an old book that mentioned a magical flower that could grant anyone three wishes. Curious and ever the troublemaker, Whiskers decided to break the rules and asked Iris for one wish. Iris, puzzled and secretly delighted, wished that Whiskers could travel the world.

Whiskers immediately felt dizzy and spun around, feeling weightless. Then the world turned upside down! He was floating high above the town, looking down at his house which now sat on the opposite side of the village. In astonishment, he spotted places he had only read about—thick forests teeming with mysterious creatures, towering
